context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

Our APM dashboards show traces arriving but zero errors and no p99 latencies. The spanmetrics connector is enabled and we see metric series flowing. Our gateway has tail_sampling and spanmetrics both configured on it. What's wrong?

checklist.name: before-upstream-of
checklist.description: The response matches the pattern: (?i)(before|upstream of|prior to|ahead of).*(sampling|tail)

checklist.name: no-recommends-raising-the-sample-rate-samplin
checklist.description: Identifies that `spanmetrics` on the gateway only sees the sampled subset of traces (after tail_sampling), so error rates and latency percentiles are computed over a biased sample. Recommends moving `spanmetrics` to the AGENT pipeline, upstream of any sampling. A response that recommends raising the sample rate, sampling 100%, or reworking the sampling policy as the fix is a FAIL.
